name: financeflow
description: FinanceFlow — controle de gastos e previsão financeira (monolito modular .NET + React PWA + Kafka)

scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-docker.js && docker compose up -d && dotnet build && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan.bold,green.bold" --names "API,WEB" "dotnet run --no-build --project src/FinanceFlow.Api" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:back: node scripts/ensure-docker.js && docker compose up -d && dotnet run --project src/FinanceFlow.Api
